conservative.name: Flaring Flames
conservative.requirements: 6 power. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: Add or remove up to 2 recharge tokens from your currently recharging Bright Order spells
Add or remove up to 4 recharge tokens from your currently recharging Bright Order spells or your Bright Order spells in hand
Add or remove up to 6 recharge tokens from your currently recharging Bright Order spells or your Bright Order spells in hand

sigmarsComet.description: Add 2 recharge tokens to every Bright Order spell in your hand, except 1 of your choice
